alashed.
Sign inGet started
MCP · OAuth 2.1 · Zero config

Your tasks,
in Claude's hands.

Track work, log focus sessions, and plan your day — all from inside Claude Code. One command to connect. No config files. No friction.

Start for free
Run once in your terminal → connected forever
$claude mcp add --transport http alashed-tracker https://mcp.tracker.alashed.kz

Three steps. That's it.

From zero to fully integrated in under two minutes.

01

Create your account

Sign up at tracker.alashed.kz. Your personal workspace is created automatically.

Takes 30 seconds
02

Run one command

Copy the command from your onboarding page and run it in your terminal. Claude handles auth automatically.

~ 5 seconds
03

Ask Claude anything

"What should I focus on?" or "Create a task for the auth bug." Claude knows your workspace and priorities.

Forever after

Everything your workflow needs

Built for developers who live inside their tools.

⚡

Claude-native task management

Create, update, and reprioritize tasks without leaving your editor. Claude understands your project context automatically.

⏱

Automatic time tracking

Log focus sessions by telling Claude. "Start working on the login bug" — session starts. "Stop" — it logs.

📊

Daily standups via Telegram

Get a morning digest of your tasks and blockers. Reply to update statuses. Your team stays in sync.

👥

Team workspaces

Invite your team to a shared workspace. Everyone gets Claude-powered task access with their own credentials.

Claude Code · Alashed MCP · Live conversation
You

What should I focus on today?

Claude

You have 5 open tasks. The highest priority is "Fix auth token refresh" — you marked it as blocking yesterday. Want me to start a focus session?

You

Yes, start it.

Claude

⏱ Focus session started for "Fix auth token refresh". I'll log your time automatically. Good luck!

Ready to ship faster?

Free to start. No credit card. Connect Claude Code in 30 seconds.

Create your account
